description_long: This jewelry object is a necklace displayed on a black, matte-finished bust stand. The necklace features three prominent, gold-toned floral motifs arranged vertically along the center of the chest area. Each floral motif is intricately detailed, with petal-like structures radiating from a central core, giving a sense of depth and texture. The gold elements contrast sharply against the deep black of the display, highlighting the ornate craftsmanship. The bust stand itself is smooth and sculpted to mimic the contours of a human neck and upper chest, providing an elegant backdrop for the jewelry. The overall presentation suggests a piece designed for formal or special occasions, with a focus on visual impact and luxury.
description: A gold-toned floral necklace displayed on a sleek black bust stand, featuring three ornate flower motifs. The design is elegant and visually striking, emphasizing luxury and craftsmanship.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three gold floral motifs of the necklace centered on the black bust stand.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the profile of the bust stand and the side projection of the necklace's motifs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted black surface of the bust stand with no visible jewelry details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace motifs' side profile and the sculpted shape of the stand.
